heading: Settings
language_description: Choose the display language for the launcher
toast_description: Show pop-up alerts when downloads finish or updates are available (only while minimised to tray)
auto_login_description: Automatically log me in when I start Savage 2
outdated_mods_warn_description: Show a warning before launching when installed mods have updates available
settings_tip: You can change your language and other settings here.
